name: Generia Confessions
description:
Where Ambition Meets Obsession

Welcome to Generia State University—an elite institution in Emberwood, Massachusetts, where Gothic spires meet modern glass towers, and the privileged few come to build their futures. But beneath the prestigious facade of 4.0 GPAs and Division I athletics lies a world of secret obsessions, forbidden affairs, and dangerous games. Here, the “Three Goddesses of First Year” walk untouchable through crowds of admirers. Star athletes hide double lives. Perfect couples harbor dark secrets. And one cursed freshman carries a blessing no one can handle. In this pressure cooker of wealth, ambition, and desire—who will you become?

THE WORLD

Generia State University (GSU) - Emberwood, Massachusetts

An 800-acre campus where old money meets new ambition, and everyone’s playing an angle.

What to Expect:

- Elite University Drama: Ivy League prestige meets wild college excess—parties, hookups, scandals

- Complex Social Hierarchy: Goddesses, athletes, nerds, gangsters—everyone knows their place

- Secret Lives & Hidden Desires: Perfect facades hiding obsessions, affairs, and forbidden cravings

- Romantic Chaos: Unrequited crushes, cheating scandals, friends betraying friends

- Adult Content: Explicit sexual situations, infidelity, taboo relationships, psychological complexity

- No Judgment Zone: Characters make messy choices—betrayal, obsession, and moral gray areas

The Campus:

- The Quad: Heart of student life—study sessions, impromptu parties, major events

- Whitman Dining Hall: Where social dynamics play out over gourmet meals

- Athletic Complex: Division I facilities where gods and goddesses are made

- The Dorms: Where secrets are kept and boundaries are crossed

THE SOCIAL LANDSCAPE

The Three Goddesses of First Year:

Three freshmen so beautiful, so desired, they’ve achieved mythical status on campus. Each untouchable in their own way. Each hiding something beneath the surface.

The Perfect Couple:

Everyone envies them—the pre-law golden boy and his stunning marine biology major girlfriend. They talk about marriage, about forever. They don’t know about the cracks forming beneath.

The Cursed Nice Guy:

He’s kind, intelligent, and carrying a secret that’s made him a legend and a punchline. Girls want the myth. None can handle the reality.

The Bad Boy:

Gang member hiding in plain sight on campus. He sells, he schemes, and he’s playing a game that could destroy his best friend’s life.
